title: MoreGlow
description: Emissive textures for ores, items, trims, sculk blocks, entities and so much more!
body:
This is a simple resource pack to make some things light up. This pack features emissive ores, armor trims, certain items and much more!

## Requires:
- OptiFine

### Alternatives (Fabric)
- MoreMcmeta/Continuity 
- Entity Texture Features (ETF)

### Alternatives (Forge)
- Conectedness
- Entity Texture Features
